# xUI

> xUI is an open-source collection of modern, interactive, themeable React + Tailwind CSS UI components. Copy, paste, and customize — every component ships as source you fully own. Built for Tailwind CSS v4 and React 19, installable via the shadcn CLI. Includes xUI Studio (a live in-browser component customizer) and a gallery of full-page templates, including real-time three.js 3D pages.

## Install

Components are distributed as a shadcn-compatible registry. Register the namespace once in your components.json:

```
{ "registries": { "@xui": "https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/r/{name}.json" } }
```

Then add any component:

```
npx shadcn@latest add @xui/card-02
```

Or use the full URL without setup:

```
npx shadcn@latest add https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/r/card-02.json
```

## Studio (live component customizer)

Open any component in Studio to edit its text, colors, size, and background with live controls (instant, no setup) and copy or export the result:

- Studio home: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/studio
- Example: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/studio/card/card-06

## Templates (full-page layouts)

Copy-ready page templates, including real-time WebGL (three.js) pages:

- Browse: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/templates
- 3D Hero (three.js): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/templates/r3f-hero
- 3D Product (three.js): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/templates/r3f-product
- 3D Particle Orb (three.js): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/templates/r3f-orb
- 3D Portfolio: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/templates/portfolio-3d
- Pricing: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/templates/pricing
- Billing: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/templates/billing
- Dashboard: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/templates/dashboard

## Components

- Cards (incl. card-06, an interactive 3D portfolio card): https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/card
- Buttons: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/button
- Alerts: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/alert
- Profiles: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/profile
- FAQ: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/faq
- Lists: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/list
- AI Input: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/ai-input

## Hooks

- useAutoResizeTextarea: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/hooks/use-auto-resize-textarea

## Docs

- Installation & getting started: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs

## Tech

React 19, Next.js 16, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, three.js / React Three Fiber, Radix UI, lucide-react.
